name: Cranberry Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the 2 cups of flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and baking soda in a bowl.
2. Using a pastry blender, cut the shortening into the dry ingredients until crumbs form.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg and combine with orange juice and orange rind. Add this mixture to the crumb mixture all at once, stirring until just moistened.
4. Combine the cranberries, walnuts, and 1 tablespoon of flour in a separate bowl. Add this mixture to the batter.
5. Grease an 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until a cake tester or wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the loaf to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning it out onto a wire rack to cool to room temperature.
9. Wrap the cooled loaf tightly in aluminum foil and let stand overnight for better slicing.
